mapper.sql: id, user_id, record_date, check_in_time, check_out_time, check_in_longitude, check_in_latitude, check_out_longitude, check_out_latitude, status, create_time
mapper.update: UPDATE attendance_record SET user_id = #{userId}, record_date = #{recordDate}, check_in_time = #{checkInTime}, check_out_time = #{checkOutTime}, check_in_longitude = #{checkInLongitude}, check_in_latitude = #{checkInLatitude}, check_out_longitude = #{checkOutLongitude}, check_out_latitude = #{checkOutLatitude}, status = #{status} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT FROM attendance_record WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND record_date = #{recordDate} LIMIT 1
SELECT FROM attendance_record ORDER BY record_date DESC, create_time DESC LIMIT #{offset}, #{limit}
